description: An assembly requires several critical, serialized components. An operator needs to scan and associate each component's serial number with the main assembly's serial number.

nodes.task_description: Scan the serial number of the main assembly unit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates the 'as-built' record for the main unit.

nodes.task_description: Scan the serial number of each critical component as it is installed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent scans three different component serial numbers.

nodes.task_description: Finalize the genealogy record, confirming that all required serialized components have been associated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent saves the completed record, creating a full traceability link between the main unit and its components.
